turningValues.scene: The CEO's firing and the job offer

stakes.description: Marcus's desire to maintain his low-stress L3 lifestyle
The potential loss of petabytes of client data and company bankruptcy
The systemic collapse of the company and the future of the engineering team

protagonistDesires.goal: To remain an anonymous, low-stress L3 developer
To save the company's stock price and his own position

themeDeliveries.theme: True leadership requires technical competence, not just authority
themeDeliveries.location: The contrast between Richard's panic/incompetence and Marcus's calm/expertise

themeDeliveries.theme: One cannot escape the burden of their own talent
themeDeliveries.location: Marcus's forced transition from L3 developer back to CEO

conflicts.description: Marcus vs the failing server infrastructure
Marcus's desire for a quiet life vs his moral obligation to fix the system
